case_title: VIOLA, CHRISTOPHER ALEXANDER et al VS GALE, GRETA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT GALE, GRETA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT VIOLA, CHRISTOPHER ALEXANDER COCHRANE, THOMAS ALTON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,489.27 FILED BY VIOLA, CHRISTOPHER ALEXANDER COCHRANE, THOMAS ALTON AS TO DEFENDANT GALE, GRETA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-1995 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT C
CERTIFIED MAIL TO GRETA GALE RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIOLA, CHRISTOPHER ALEXANDER COCHRANE, THOMAS ALTON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALE, GRETA $889.27 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $910.27, TOTAL DEP UNACCOUNTED FOR $664.37, $224.90 IN INTEREST.
